title: orthopichonia lacourtiana
intro: Orthopichonia lacourtiana is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orthopichonia lacourtiana include the relief of fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential in treating wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve the use of its roots, which are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
